query: show me invoiced spend by supplier for our manufacturing business unit last quarter
expected_behavior: Loads oracle-fusion-procurement with oracle-fusion-overview as parent
Scopes the _ALL tables by business unit (PRC_BU_ID) for the manufacturing BU
Rolls up by supplier via POZ_SUPPLIERS (VENDOR_ID), using the invoiced spend basis as stated
Excludes canceled / closed POs (CANCEL_FLAG, CLOSED_CODE) from spend
Composes the keystone for accounted-currency normalization
anti_behavior: Does NOT sum across business units without a BU scope
Does NOT count canceled POs as spend
Does NOT silently switch the spend basis (ordered/received) from the requested invoiced basis
